ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_stats" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the statistics apply */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region within the state */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests administered */,
  "positives" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "hosp" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu" INTEGER /* Number of ICU admissions */,
  "vent" INTEGER /* Number of ventilator uses */,
  "vaccines" INTEGER /* Number of vaccines administered */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the statistics apply */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the statistics apply */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms presented by patients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "state_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbrev" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data was accessed */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State for which the data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Date range for which data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State where the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "testkit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test kit used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was administered */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State where the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (e.g., 1st dose, 2nd dose) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the vaccination */,
  "vaccine_administrator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who administered the vaccine */,
  "vaccine_batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vaccine_administrator FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_administrator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State where the patient resides */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical conditions of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the hospitalization was recorded */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State where the hospitalization occurred */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who was hospitalized */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged */,
  "admitting_doctor" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who admitted the patient */,
  "discharging_doctor" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who discharged the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_discharging_doctor FOREIGN KEY ("discharging_doctor") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_admitting_doctor FOREIGN KEY ("admitting_doctor") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_records" (
  "icu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU admission */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the ICU admission was recorded */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State where the ICU admission occurred */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who was admitted to the ICU */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted to the ICU */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged from the ICU */,
  "admitting_doctor" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who admitted the patient to the ICU */,
  "discharging_doctor" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who discharged the patient from the ICU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_records_admitting_doctor FOREIGN KEY ("admitting_doctor") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_records_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_records_discharging_doctor FOREIGN KEY ("discharging_doctor") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
